query:
SELECT c.code, c.title, COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count, GROUP_CONCAT(l.id ORDER BY l.id) as lesson_ids
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
